title: salvadoraceae
intro: The Salvadora family, also known as Salvadoraceae, is a small family of flowering plants. It is a taxonomic rank that consists of a group of plants sharing similar characteristics and evolutionary relationships. Salvadora is a family of flowering plants that includes species found in tropical and subtropical regions, known for their medicinal properties and unique features. Salvadoraceae comprises around 4 to 6 species, primarily within the genus Salvadora.
